top_signals.title: Strange bedfellows: Manga and lesbian sex work agencies team up for storytelling
top_signals.summary: Agencies and sex workers seek to present more nuanced depictions of their work and to challenge mainstream narratives that often emphasize scandal, eroticism or exploitation.

top_signals.title: Anthropic rolls out Sonnet 5 with near-Opus 4.8 performance at a lower price
top_signals.summary: Anthropic is now rolling out Sonnet 5, and it's almost as good as the Opus range, but it is designed to be cheaper than the company's flagship model. [...]
